title: fraxinus syriaca var. persica
intro: Fraxinus syriaca var. persica, also known as the Persian ash, is a variety of the Syrian ash tree, a deciduous tree native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The Persian ash is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Fraxinus syriaca var. persica is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
